final_chunks.section_title: TRADING THE BEARISH REJECTION BLOCK
final_chunks.text:

final_chunks.section_title: DEFINING THE BULLISH REJECTION BLOCK
final_chunks.text:
DEFINING THE BULLISH REJECTION BLOCK
For the bullish side of the marketplace, a Bullish Rejection Block occurs in ideal scenarios in major to intermediate-term uptrends. It forms when a price low has formed with a long wick or wicks (potentially over multiple candles).
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 04 - ICT Rejection Block_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: 2022 MODEL
final_chunks.text:
2022 MODEL
